response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the first song as a cover of 'Trust Me' by Yuuya Matsushita (from Durarara), performed by Hololive members. Search query: `"Trust Me" Yuuya Matsushita Japanese and English lyrics`. 2. Identified the second song as a cover of 'Kanashimi wo Yasashisa ni' by Little by Little (from Naruto), performed by Hololive members. Search query: `"Kanashimi wo Yasashisa ni" Little by Little Japanese and English lyrics`. 3. Identified the middle section (02:36-03:52) as a dialogue sequence with no vocal music.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two song covers performed by Hololive members Tokoyami Towa, Yozora Mel, and Hoshimachi Suisei, with a dialogue interval in between.

scenes.description: Three characters singing and dancing to a cover of 'Trust Me'. The song title appears on screen at 00:02.
